sections.paragraph:
- Original: Αὔγουστος

- Transliteration: Augoustos

- Phonetic: ow'-goos-tos

- Definition: Augustus = "venerable"

1. the first Roman emperor

2. title conferred upon Roman emperors

- Origin: "from Latin ["august"]"

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From Latin (august); Augustus a title of the Roman emperor: - Augustus.
